prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your financial independence forward
items: Calculate your exact net worth by listing all assets and debts
Define your specific financial independence number and target retirement age
Research and compare 3 different investment account types available to you
Track all your expenses for 30 days to identify spending patterns
Open and fund your first investment account with $500 or your target amount
Calculate your current savings rate as a percentage of your take-home income
